description: Ordered implementation changes by impact × urgency. Complete in order: each item is a prerequisite for the next.

changes.title: Enable SQLite WAL mode
changes.impact: Unblocks concurrent reads during writes; prevents writer starvation

changes.title: Create chunk_queue table and migrate 51 chunks
changes.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chunk_queue (...); INSERT INTO chunk_queue(chunk_id, chunk_file_path) VALUES ...;
changes.impact: Establishes lease-based queue state; one-time migration from file list

changes.title: Implement grant_lease() with IMMEDIATE isolation
changes.description: Replace file-list dispatch with atomic lease grant. See report.md Section 2 for full Python implementation.
changes.impact: Eliminates duplicate chunk execution (FM-4); provides stuck chunk detection (FM-1)

changes.title: Create sink_outbox and sink_sync_ledger tables
changes.sql_ref: report.md Section 3 — sink_outbox and sink_sync_ledger CREATE TABLE statements
changes.impact: Establishes durable record staging; enables replay; enables sync progress tracking

changes.title: Implement heartbeat() and reclaim_expired_leases()
changes.description: Worker sends heartbeat every 5 min. Orchestrator reclaimer runs every 5 min via cron or background thread.
changes.impact: Closes the stuck-chunk detection loop; enables automatic recovery without manual intervention

changes.title: Modify persistence_gateway.py to write to sink_outbox before sink write
changes.description: Before any ClickHouse/Neo4j write: INSERT INTO sink_outbox(record_id, chunk_id, record_type, payload_json). On sink write success, call _mark_synced(). On failure, leave PENDING for sweep.
changes.impact: Makes every scan event durably captured before sink attempt; enables silent failure recovery (FM-2)

changes.title: Implement outbox sweep background thread with retry classification
changes.description: 30s sweep cycle; batch 1000 records; apply retry classification table (see report.md Section 3). Auth failures halt sweep + emit alert.
changes.impact: Eliminates silent sink failures; provides structured retry with storm prevention

changes.title: Implement ConcurrencyController with backpressure signals
changes.description: Read backpressure signals from SQLite; adjust scanner parallelism. Thresholds: depth >10k → -25%; >50k → halt leasing.
changes.impact: Prevents unbounded outbox growth during sink degradation; maintains stable operation under load

changes.title: Add master status query as hourly cron output
changes.description: Run master status SQL query (report.md Section 7) every hour; output to ops channel / log file
changes.impact: Immediate pipeline observability; basis for hourly leadership reports

changes.title: Run SLO-1 and SLO-6 drills before production promotion
changes.description: SLO-1: Kill worker mid-chunk; restart; verify 0 duplicate rows in sink. SLO-6: Manually expire a lease; verify reclaim within 5 min.
